headline: Helen of Troy Q1 Earnings Coming Up: What Should Investors Expect?
summary: HELE is likely to post modest Q1 revenue growth, but weak earnings, tariffs and cautious spending may have pressured margins as brand investments continue.

headline: Trump Rolls Out $500 Million Lifeline for Smaller Meatpackers as Beeflation Spirals Out of Control — But Tyson Foods and Other Industry Giants Are Left Out
summary: The Trump administration is offering financial support to smaller meatpackers struggling with escalating beef prices due to a shortage of cattle supplies and the reemergence of New World Screwworm. On Tuesday, the U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) allocated up to...
